programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones speaks on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fuelled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: The Deal with Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Protect. How can we be optimistic in 2025? As Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Waste is a significant contributor to global warming, but turning it into a resource can help curb emissions and shrink humanity's environmental footprint.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world's most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank's success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Bioacoustics technology and AI are revealing how animals communicate, and may soon allow us to talk to them. What can we learn from wildlife, and should we be talking to the animals at all?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: With the promise of unimaginable computing power, a global race for quantum supremacy is raging. Who will be first to harness this new technological force, and what will they do with it?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Water. Our survival depends on water, yet global reserves are rapidly shrinking. Can technology help secure humanity's future water needs?

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry

programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry

programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Survivor S50
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is “In the Hands of the Fans”! The players won't know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: Barry (Troy Gentile) objects when Adam (Sean Giambrone) and Lainey (AJ Michalka) are cast as lovers in the school's production of Phantom of the Opera. Beverly (Wendi McLendon-Covey) makes sure Erica (Hayley Orrantia) can't coast through her senior year.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune S5
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: A small town in Washington is rocked after a local man is found shot to death in his home. Police wonder if his complicated love life played a role until a string of robberies exposes a dangerous couple with a more sinister motive.

programme.title: The Guest

programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: 桃花映江山 / The Princess' Gambit
programme.desc: 《桃花映江山》讲述了祁国左相沈在野因一次政敌处心积虑的陷害，与北苑国和亲公主姜桃花相识，一个腹黑狠辣，一个狡猾伶俐，在波谲云诡的两朝时局之下，二人斗智斗勇、互相算计，在面对强敌的被迫合作中又暗生情愫，在面对国家与爱情的选择，他们突破重重阻碍，共谋定江山……。The drama tells the story of a fallen princess forced into a political marriage with a corrupt prime minister. She faces numerous dangers but strives to survive to protect herself amidst the conflicts of national loyalty, personal vengeance, and true love. Meanwhile, the prime minister, outwardly ambitious to become a treacherous official, secretly harbours a desire...

programme.title: 心动的信号 6 / Heart Signal 6
programme.desc: 《心动的信号 6》延续以往的都市男女恋爱社交推理真人秀节目的模式，节目以中素人单身男女日常相处的生活细节和情感走向为主体，每期心动侦探团来反观和解读位素人之间的情感交流和心动信号，并进行心动连线。 Reality dating show “Heart Signal” returns with a 6th season this year. The series sees single men and women live together for a period of time to find a possible love match with someone under the same roof. Celebrity artistes form the panel of love detectives who will observe from the sides. At the end of each episode, the panel makes a prediction on which couple will likely make a match wit...

programme.title: 烈焰 / Burning Flames
programme.desc: 故事讲述王子武庚拥有神族和人族的双重血脉，天资不凡，桀骜不驯。然辛国被神族覆灭，父母离世，高高在上的王子沦为奴隶。武庚在困境中历经磨难，与市井少女白菜和一群志同道合的朋友相识，带领人族集结神隐部、妖族、海灵族等，携手对抗强大的神族。武庚不断磨砺成长，从国仇家恨到为天下苍生而战，不断成长强大，成为天之战神。

programme.title: 蛮好的人生 / A Better Life
programme.desc: 三十九岁的保险从业人员胡曼黎在以为自己即将迎接人生巅峰之时，却同时失去了婚姻和工作。竞争对手暗中作梗，胡曼黎惨遭公司开除，而始作俑者竟是二十八岁的薛晓舟。胡曼黎在与薛晓舟几番交手后，他们逐渐从误解到相互认同，胡曼黎决定不计前嫌和薛晓舟联手合作，从头再来。薛晓舟成长为保险业界不容小觑的金牌销冠，胡曼黎也决定回归自己的事业主场。 Hu Man Li, a thirty-nine-year-old insurance practitioner, lost her marriage and job at the same time when she thought she was about to reach the peak of her life. Competitors secretly interfered, and Hu Man Li was fired from the company. The instigator turned out to be 28-year-old Xue Xiao Zhou. After several encounters between Hu ...

programme.title: 赴山海 / The Journey of Legend
programme.desc: 肖明明曾是一名酷爱武侠小说、意气风发、充满正义感的少年。可步入社会后，现实磨平了他的棱角，逐渐成了一介怂人，如今只靠上网写武侠小说寄托自己的侠心。适逢公司研发一款沉浸式科技魔典写作系统，该系统在输入小说大纲后，可将使用者投射为故事主角，并根据使用者的行动补全故事，生成小说。作为写手，肖明明以小说男主角萧秋水的视角游历了一次武林世界。An author enters his novel as character Xiao Qiu Shui, getting caught in martial arts conflicts. After finding a system while seeking a manual, he must become the ultimate martial master to go home.

programme.title: 末代厨娘 / The Last Cook
programme.desc: 清末民初，民女容儿阴差阳错成为宫女后，与侍卫李琪结下渊源。因为对厨艺有悟性，所以颇受寿喜姑姑赏识，被其收为徒传授厨技。当寿喜被诬陷盗窃宫内珍宝而置于死地后，容儿不甘师傅冤死，与李琪并肩查案追回国宝，让幕后黑手受到应有的惩罚。最后，离开皇宫的容儿开了一家饭馆，人称“末代厨娘”。Set during the final years of the Qing Dynasty, this drama tells the story of Rong Er, a commoner who finds the opportunity to serve in the palace as a lady-in-waiting. Rong Er’s cooking skills gets acknowledged by Shouxi, a ranked palace maid, who takes her as a disciple. After Shouxi is murdered, Rong Er and Li Qi, a palace guard, works together to uncov...

programme.title: 桃花映江山 / The Princess' Gambit

She faces numerous dangers but strives to survive to protect herself amidst the conflicts of national loyalty, personal vengeance, and true love. Meanwhile, the prime minister, outwardly ambitious to become a treacherous official, secretly harbours a desire...

programme.title: 秘密的女人 / Woman in a Veil
programme.desc: 郑冬天是个暖心的女孩，虽然家境贫寒仍有开朗乐观的心，她与YJ集团会长之子南佑振相遇并结婚，但丈夫却背著自己和朋友朱爱罗发生婚外情，冬天更因为他们失去视力，成了有意识的植物人。尽管内心呐喊著，却没人听到她悲愤的心声，就在此时，冬天意外与意图谋害她的吴世璘灵魂交换，藉著对方的身躯，她要查明真相、展开复仇...

Competitors secretly interfered, and Hu Man Li was fired from the company. The instigator turned out to be 28-year-old Xue Xiao Zhou. After several encounters between Hu ...

programme.title: 型男大主厨 / Stylish Man
programme.desc: 台湾广受欢迎的常青美食料理节目，由2006年始播至今，2011年还获选金钟奖的最佳综合节目主持人奖。每一期将有不同的主题：“大明星來下廚”由兩位明星或两个明星档分組對抗，拿出自己的拿手菜對抗比拼；“五分钟出好菜”由两位厨师根据指定食材，在五分钟内烹煮出易学美味的一道菜等。这是一个富有娱乐效果的轻松美食节目，能够持续制作这么多年不是没有理由的。

programme.title: 一城一味第四季 ·巴蜀关东 / One City One Taste S4. Spice and Snow
programme.desc: 《一城一味·巴蜀关东》是一部以巴蜀、关东两地特色风味为指引的纪录片，聚焦成都、自贡、眉山、哈尔滨、沈阳、大连等极具美食、人文、自然特色的城市，以深入探寻美食江湖中的“三重境界”—食材江湖的鲜活本味、做法江湖的独门技艺、烟火江湖的人情温度为主。“One City One Taste S4· Spice and Snow” takes China Cheng Du as the starting point, and branch out to other surrounding provinces such as Harbin, Shen Yang, Da Lian. Marrying food and streets, markets, stores, chefs, and customers from different perspectives, the documentary presents the multi-dimensional tastes of Sichuan cuisine in a refreshing and never-seen-before manner.

programme.title: 味道大师 / A Bite of Eternity
programme.desc: 《味道大师》从“酸、甜、苦、辣、咸、鲜、臭、麻”八种基本口味出发，跳脱地域标签的展示化框架，更聚焦于口味背后的人与故事。这是一部将口味作为情感、身份、文化综合呈现的纪录片，也是一部借由美食观看口味如何影响国人生活及性格的作品。纪录片将走进二十余座城市，呈现百余道菜品，以八集故事构建中国人的口味交响乐。A documentary series that explores the rich culture of Chinese flavours. Each episode highlights how taste reflects personality, cultural identity, and lifestyle, creating a vivid journey through China’s culinary traditions.

programme.title: 冤家变亲家 / Unpredictable Family
programme.desc: 三十年前离婚的夫妇成了冤家，因子女们相爱而以亲家的关系再度重逢，在放下旧日恩怨后，重生成为真正的一家人的温馨故事。Eun Sung is an unknown actress after three striving years. Sun Woo, on the other hand, is a successful film director. When Eun Sung and Sun Woo fall in love and decide to marry, they believe their different worlds can come together. However, their happiness is shaken when they discover that their parents were once married and divorced 30 years ago as bitter enemies. Old grudges resurface, and the hostility between their parents turns th...

However, their happiness is shaken when they discover that their parents were once married and divorced 30 years ago as bitter enemies. Old grudges resurface, and the hostility between their parents turns th...

programme.title: 烈焰 / Burning Flames
programme.desc: 故事讲述王子武庚拥有神族和人族的双重血脉，天资不凡，桀骜不驯。然辛国被神族覆灭，父母离世，高高在上的王子沦为奴隶。武庚在困境中历经磨难，与市井少女白菜和一群志同道合的朋友相识，带领人族集结神隐部、妖族、海灵族等，携手对抗强大的神族。武庚不断磨砺成长，从国仇家恨到为天下苍生而战，不断成长强大，成为天之战神。

programme.title: 桃花映江山 / The Princess' Gambit
programme.desc: 《桃花映江山》讲述了祁国左相沈在野因一次政敌处心积虑的陷害，与北苑国和亲公主姜桃花相识，一个腹黑狠辣，一个狡猾伶俐，在波谲云诡的两朝时局之下，二人斗智斗勇、互相算计，在面对强敌的被迫合作中又暗生情愫，在面对国家与爱情的选择，他们突破重重阻碍，共谋定江山……。The drama tells the story of a fallen princess forced into a political marriage with a corrupt prime minister. She faces numerous dangers but strives to survive to protect herself amidst the conflicts of national loyalty, personal vengeance, and true love. Meanwhile, the prime minister, outwardly ambitious to become a treacherous official, secretly harbours a desire...

Old grudges resurface, and the hostility between their parents turns th...

programme.title: 正当防卫 / Justifiable Defense
programme.desc: 《正当防卫》该剧讲述了市检察院资深检察官段鸿山在办理“被家暴女性杀夫”案件时，省检察院青年检察官方灵渊被任派协助办案。两人办案过程中，发现案件与十四年前段鸿山办理的李沐风、梅筝、江婷经历的“校园防卫过当案”息息相关，二人以事实为根据，以法律为准绳，综合考量“天理、人情、国法”，最终给予案件准确定性的故事。Senior prosecutor Duan Hong Shan from the city prosecutor's office is handling a case involving a woman who killed her husband due to domestic violence. Young prosecutor Fang Ling Yuan from the provincial prosecutor's office is assigned to assist in the investigation. During the process of handling the case, they discovered a connection betwe...

programme.title: 正当防卫 / Justifiable Defense
programme.desc: 《正当防卫》该剧讲述了市检察院资深检察官段鸿山在办理“被家暴女性杀夫”案件时，省检察院青年检察官方灵渊被任派协助办案。两人办案过程中，发现案件与十四年前段鸿山办理的李沐风、梅筝、江婷经历的“校园防卫过当案”息息相关，二人以事实为根据，以法律为准绳，综合考量“天理、人情、国法”，最终给予案件准确定性的故事。Senior prosecutor Duan Hong Shan from the city prosecutor's office is handling a case involving a woman who killed her husband due to domestic violence. She faces numerous dangers but strives to survive to protect herself amidst the conflicts of national loyalty, personal vengeance, and true love. Meanwhile, the prime minister, outwardly ambitious to become a treacherous official, secretly harbours a desire...

programme.title: 型男大主厨 / Stylish Man
programme.desc: 台湾广受欢迎的常青美食料理节目，由2006年始播至今，2011年还获选金钟奖的最佳综合节目主持人奖。每一期将有不同的主题：“大明星來下廚”由兩位明星或两个明星档分組對抗，拿出自己的拿手菜對抗比拼；“五分钟出好菜”由两位厨师根据指定食材，在五分钟内烹煮出易学美味的一道菜等。这是一个富有娱乐效果的轻松美食节目，能够持续制作这么多年不是没有理由的。

programme.title: 一城一味第四季 ·巴蜀关东 / One City One Taste S4. Spice and Snow
programme.desc: 《一城一味·巴蜀关东》是一部以巴蜀、关东两地特色风味为指引的纪录片，聚焦成都、自贡、眉山、哈尔滨、沈阳、大连等极具美食、人文、自然特色的城市，以深入探寻美食江湖中的“三重境界”—食材江湖的鲜活本味、做法江湖的独门技艺、烟火江湖的人情温度为主。“One City One Taste S4· Spice and Snow” takes China Cheng Du as the starting point, and branch out to other surrounding provinces such as Harbin, Shen Yang, Da Lian. Marrying food and streets, markets, stores, chefs, and customers from different perspectives, the documentary presents the multi-dimensional tastes of Sichuan cuisine in a refreshing and never-seen-before manner.

programme.title: 味道大师 / A Bite of Eternity
programme.desc: 《味道大师》从“酸、甜、苦、辣、咸、鲜、臭、麻”八种基本口味出发，跳脱地域标签的展示化框架，更聚焦于口味背后的人与故事。这是一部将口味作为情感、身份、文化综合呈现的纪录片，也是一部借由美食观看口味如何影响国人生活及性格的作品。纪录片将走进二十余座城市，呈现百余道菜品，以八集故事构建中国人的口味交响乐。A documentary series that explores the rich culture of Chinese flavours. Each episode highlights how taste reflects personality, cultural identity, and lifestyle, creating a vivid journey through China’s culinary traditions.

programme.title: 四方馆 / Go East
programme.desc: 讲述了雍国外交机构“四方馆”里的元莫、阿术、王昆吾、尉迟华等四方志士并肩作战，携手成长，共同破解“四方迷局”的故事. A period drama with romance, comedy and intrigue focusing on Yuan Mo, an unofficial member of the Sifang Pavilion and the mysterious Shu, as they work together to prevent a sinister organization from inciting a war.

programme.desc: 讲述了雍国外交机构“四方馆”里的元莫、阿术、王昆吾、尉迟华等四方志士并肩作战，携手成长，共同破解“四方迷局”的故事. A period drama with romance, comedy and intrigue focusing on Yuan Mo, an unofficial member of the Sifang Pavilion and the mysterious Shu, as they work together to prevent a sinister organization from inciting a war.

programme.title: 夜色正浓 / The Glamorous Night
programme.desc: 该剧根据右耳的原著小说《Sales夫妇》改编，讲述了一群在洋酒行业相关工作的年轻人，行业白领们，为了业绩与生活努力奋斗拼搏，一路上被人性与现实考验，最终从底层的促销员成为行业风云人物的成长故事。Adapted from You Er’s novel "Sales Couple", the series tells the story of a group of young professionals working in the imported liquor industry as white-collar workers strive to succeed in both their careers and personal lives.

programme.title: 夜色正浓 / The Glamorous Night
programme.desc: 该剧根据右耳的原著小说《Sales夫妇》改编，讲述了一群在洋酒行业相关工作的年轻人，行业白领们，为了业绩与生活努力奋斗拼搏，一路上被人性与现实考验，最终从底层的促销员成为行业风云人物的成长故事。Adapted from You Er’s novel "Sales Couple", the series tells the story of a group of young professionals working in the imported liquor industry as white-collar workers strive to succeed in both their careers and personal lives.

programme.title: 真料理两锅论 / Let's Guo
programme.desc: 料理实境节目《真料理两锅论》由邰智源、罗时丰、黄镫辉、KID林柏升、温妮、丘涵共同主持。节目中主持人们将分为两组PK对决，亲自出马找寻稀有食材、超强主厨及传奇秘方与菜单，献上最美味的完美料理。Cooking reality show “Let’s Guo” is hosted by Taiwanese artistes Tai Chih-yuan, Lo Shih-feng, Huang Chien-hui, KID Lin Po-sheng, Winnie, and Chiu Han. In the show, the hosts are divided into two teams for competition, venturing out to seek for rare ingredients, exceptional chefs, and legendary recipes and menus, presenting the most delicious and perfect dishes.

programme.title: 七根心简 / The Seven Relics of Ill Omen
programme.desc: 上古陨铁带来七个能寄生人体、引人作恶的异物。大德以神木制成“七根心简”并封印。百年后心简重现，离奇凶案频发。木代、罗韧、炎红砂、一万三、曹严华五位热血青年组成“凤凰小分队”，踏上收服凶简之旅。In ancient times, a meteorite descended on earth and brought along seven mysterious creatures which could parasitize humans, interfere consciousness, and lead to evil. To subdue these forces, a master crafted seven wooden tablets from a sacred tree and named them the “Seven Heart Tablets”, and locks were forged to seal the tablets. Throughout generations, the sealing of the Heart Tablets continued ...

programme.title: 七根心简 / The Seven Relics of Ill Omen
programme.desc: 上古陨铁带来七个能寄生人体、引人作恶的异物。大德以神木制成“七根心简”并封印。百年后心简重现，离奇凶案频发。木代、罗韧、炎红砂、一万三、曹严华五位热血青年组成“凤凰小分队”，踏上收服凶简之旅。In ancient times, a meteorite descended on earth and brought along seven mysterious creatures which could parasitize humans, interfere consciousness, and lead to evil. To subdue these forces, a master crafted seven wooden tablets from a sacred tree and named them the “Seven Heart Tablets”, and locks were forged to seal the tablets. Throughout generations, the sealing of the Heart Tablets continued ...

programme.title: 灿烂的转身 / The Magical Women
programme.desc: 性格迥异的苏菲与安宁惺惺相惜，共同应对了苏菲家庭破裂的阵痛后，展开新生活。在两人相互温暖的过程中，苏菲发现了安宁不为人知的过去，让这对密友再次历经狂风暴雨。宽容接纳命运的所有馈赠，及“你若犯我，我必诛之”的果敢，都是她们灿烂人生中的必修课。

programme.title: 年少有为 / No Pain No Gain
programme.desc: 打工人裴谦惨遭辞退后，意外获得神秘大佬的邀请，需创办一家必须以亏损为目标的公司。于是他故意集齐各种虾兵蟹将、给员工加薪发福利，也投资了各种奇葩项目。不料竟一次次意外反转，成为了业界的商业奇才、员工心中的良心老板。有苦难言的裴谦不得不带领公司继续逆风翻盘，终成当地第一集团。Salaryman Qian is laid off but unexpectedly receives an offer from a mysterious tycoon to found a company that must operate at a loss. He deliberately hires incompetent employees, offer them unimaginable raises and benefits while also investing in bizarre projects. Surprisingly, all his ventures turn out to be successful. Respected by his employees and recogn...

programme.title: 黑盒子 / The Black Box
programme.desc: 改编自Line Webtoon同名惊悚漫画，本剧以拥有神秘力量的黑盒作为主轴，串连四个独立却彼此呼应的单元——〈造物狱〉、〈星际救援〉、〈猪人〉及〈黑白盒子〉，探讨人类在欲望与救赎之间的挣扎，见证人们如何为爱、梦、亲情与欲望付出代价。Adapted from a popular Line Webtoon comic series, this mini-drama comprises 4 extraordinary stories of love, loss, and fate: a sculptor uses forbidden magic to imprison her ex for perfect love; an astronaut forms an unspoken bond with an alien through a comic, a boy swaps souls with a pig and learns the enduring love of his family, and a street beggar trades his future for endl...

He deliberately hires incompetent employees, offer them unimaginable raises and benefits while also investing in bizarre projects. Surprisingly, all his ventures turn out to be successful. Respected by his employees and recogn...

programme.title: 巨塔之后 / The Queen Of Castle
programme.desc: 明塱医院外科名医董一妍与医院主席王进涛在欧洲盛大圆婚，却不受王家众人的欢迎。婚礼翌日，进涛与儿孙一同坠机遇难，让王家与明塱集团顿时陷入混乱。眼看进涛的宿敌柯永成伺机搅局，一妍试图拉拢王家两个媳妇携手维持大局，却被怀疑与这场空难有关。面临内忧外患的她会如何在这场权力与利益的争夺战中胜出？Renowned surgeon Yan married her hospital’s chairman Tao in Europe, without the blessings from his family. The next day after the wedding, a fatal plane crash killed Tao and his heirs, leaving behind his two daughters-in-law. Branded a suspect and surrounded by rivals who are eyeing Tao’s company, Yan must manage her family’s internal power struggles a...

programme.title: 愿望 / Desires
programme.desc: 周胜强、陈进辉与方耀武是共赴东南亚发展的结拜兄弟。某天三人冒险从事走私活动，却因为鬼王使其关系产生变化。鬼王为了夺回钻石，追杀周胜强等人，后因方耀武为了自保，导致替周胜强挡下子弹的陈进辉跌下山崖失忆。之后陈进辉被鬼王的女儿明娜救起后到日本发展，并改名青木洋介。陈进辉失踪后，妻子江碧玉与长子陈子维因走投无路而被高世贤救下，而后发现怀上遗腹女陈晓春。。。28 years ago, three sworn brothers Qiang, Hui and Wu prayed earnestly in the temple for their diamond smuggling deal in Myanmar to succeed. When they arrived in the Myanmar mountains however, they were betrayed by the Ghost King who decided to kill them instead. Hui shielded Qiang from bullets but fell off from the clif...

programme.title: 爱的荣耀 / Glory of Love
programme.desc: 一桩吸金诈骗案意外改变了三个女人的命运：有如大树般坚强的女性；如花般绽放的富家千金；也有如小草般的平凡女性。借由三个女主角来传达自信、勇气及自我价值的重要性，从爱出发能克服任何困境、挖掘出无限潜能和力量！A money-driven fraud case unexpectedly alters the destinies of three women: a resilient woman resembling a sturdy tree, a wealthy daughter blossoming like a flower, and an ordinary woman akin to grass. These three heroines convey the message of self-worth, highlighting the importance of love in overcoming challenges and unlocking one’s unlimited potential.

When they arrived in the Myanmar mountains however, they were betrayed by the Ghost King who decided to kill them instead. Hui shielded Qiang from bullets but fell off from the clif...

programme.title: 那些年，那些歌 / Memorable Classic Songs
programme.desc: 全新音乐节目《那些年。那些歌》由音乐大师陈国华主持，邀请乐坛重量级歌王歌后，串连老、中、青三代音乐人，畅聊温馨感人的音乐故事，改编金典歌曲，用最动听的歌声，带领观众重温60、70年代的美好时光。 Memorable Classic Songs is a new music programs hosted by Chen Guo

programme.title: 镜行曲 / Mirror Walker
programme.desc: 节目以“城市味道、人情故事”为主轴，走访台湾各地，深入巷弄、街头、老店，挖掘最具代表性的在地小吃与背后的故事。后13集的节目则走访台湾各个角落的火车站，带观众探索人烟稀少的古朴小站及周边的人文风景，展现台湾的温度与深度。A lifestyle series that focuses on the culinary soul of Taiwan’s cities, exploring how local snacks reflect the culture, history, and daily lives of the people. From bustling night markets to hidden alleyway eateries, the series offers a warm, authentic look at Taiwan’s urban flavours and the people who preserve them. The last 13 episodes take viewers to quaint little train stations i...

programme.title: 新闻女王 2 / The Queen Of News 2
programme.desc: 文慧心退隐新闻界半年，SNK生巨变。市场管理出身的古肇华空降总监一职，视新闻为赚钱工具；副总监张家妍取代了梁景仁的地位，纵握大权却难服众。文慧心以“新闻女王”姿态强势回归，收购刘艳创办的网媒“公开平台”，向传统主流媒体发起挑战。新旧媒体交锋再掀明争暗斗……。After a hiatus of 6 months, Wen returns as the “Queen of News”, to acquire a digital news platform – the “Open Platform”. Her return challenges traditional mass media including her former company SNK which is now headed by Gu who is a marketer concerned with only monetising news. A clash between the traditional and new media erupts…

programme.title: 灿烂的转身 / The Magical Women
programme.desc: 性格迥异的苏菲与安宁惺惺相惜，共同应对了苏菲家庭破裂的阵痛后，展开新生活。在两人相互温暖的过程中，苏菲发现了安宁不为人知的过去，让这对密友再次历经狂风暴雨。宽容接纳命运的所有馈赠，及“你若犯我，我必诛之”的果敢，都是她们灿烂人生中的必修课。

programme.title: 超级冰冰Show / Super Bing Bing Show
programme.desc: 【超级冰冰 Show】是台湾综艺大姐大白冰冰新开的大型台语综艺歌唱节目，联同主持的还有阳帆及台一线。两小时的节目，将邀请观众喜爱的老中青歌手，演唱经典或流行的台语歌曲，让观众听出耳油来。想听好歌，就千万别错过！

programme.title: 灿烂的转身 / The Magical Women
programme.desc: 性格迥异的苏菲与安宁惺惺相惜，共同应对了苏菲家庭破裂的阵痛后，展开新生活。在两人相互温暖的过程中，苏菲发现了安宁不为人知的过去，让这对密友再次历经狂风暴雨。宽容接纳命运的所有馈赠，及“你若犯我，我必诛之”的果敢，都是她们灿烂人生中的必修课。

programme.title: 型男大主厨 / Stylish Man
programme.desc: 台湾广受欢迎的常青美食料理节目，由2006年始播至今，2011年还获选金钟奖的最佳综合节目主持人奖。每一期将有不同的主题：“大明星來下廚”由兩位明星或两个明星档分組對抗，拿出自己的拿手菜對抗比拼；“五分钟出好菜”由两位厨师根据指定食材，在五分钟内烹煮出易学美味的一道菜等。这是一个富有娱乐效果的轻松美食节目，能够持续制作这么多年不是没有理由的。

programme.title: 新闻女王 2 / The Queen Of News 2
programme.desc: 文慧心退隐新闻界半年，SNK生巨变。市场管理出身的古肇华空降总监一职，视新闻为赚钱工具；副总监张家妍取代了梁景仁的地位，纵握大权却难服众。文慧心以“新闻女王”姿态强势回归，收购刘艳创办的网媒“公开平台”，向传统主流媒体发起挑战。新旧媒体交锋再掀明争暗斗……。After a hiatus of 6 months, Wen returns as the “Queen of News”, to acquire a digital news platform – the “Open Platform”. Her return challenges traditional mass media including her former company SNK which is now headed by Gu who is a marketer concerned with only monetising news. A clash between the traditional and new media erupts…

programme.title: 型男大主厨 / Stylish Man
programme.desc: 台湾广受欢迎的常青美食料理节目，由2006年始播至今，2011年还获选金钟奖的最佳综合节目主持人奖。每一期将有不同的主题：“大明星來下廚”由兩位明星或两个明星档分組對抗，拿出自己的拿手菜對抗比拼；“五分钟出好菜”由两位厨师根据指定食材，在五分钟内烹煮出易学美味的一道菜等。这是一个富有娱乐效果的轻松美食节目，能够持续制作这么多年不是没有理由的。

programme.title: 超级夜总会 / Super Nightclub
programme.desc: 台湾年度最新重金推出的户外歌唱综艺秀，它是耗资了千万打造的全台唯一行动舞台车，不只会全省走透透，还会邀请超级卡司，重现当年歌舞秀的热闹风光。听好歌，看好秀，就在由超级搭档——彭恰恰,许效舜所主持的〈超级夜总会〉，〈佳乐台〉抢先火速送上。

programme.title: 超级红人榜精选 / Top Singers Specials
programme.desc: 难得一见、以台语歌曲为主的选秀节目即将登场！〈超级红人榜〉的宗旨是为了发扬台语歌曲，提供一个平台让对台语歌曲怀有热忱的各界人士发挥所长，发掘更多的演艺人才。这个节目自从开播以来屡创收视新高，通过知性风趣的于美人和选秀出生的蔡昌宪的轻松主持，您会惊讶地发现，原来台语歌曲不是年长人士的专有，原来年轻人唱起台语经典歌曲来也是很酷的！

programme.title: 追分成功 / Define Your Own Success
programme.desc: 这是一部现代家庭伦理剧，看同住一屋簷下的单身房客，北漂追求梦想，在收获爱情、友情的同时，也面临得到与失去。他们向往完美爱情、渴望幸福婚姻、追求事业高升，不停向前“追分”，在这一路跌撞、相互陪伴的欢笑与泪水中，定义属于自己的“成功”！This drama series follows a group of single tenants under the same roof who travelled north to pursue their dreams, love and friendship. They yearn for perfect love, long for a happy marriage, and a good career advancement. Stumbling along the way with tears and laughter, they each define success by their own standards.

programme.title: 追分成功 / Define Your Own Success
programme.desc: 这是一部现代家庭伦理剧，看同住一屋簷下的单身房客，北漂追求梦想，在收获爱情、友情的同时，也面临得到与失去。他们向往完美爱情、渴望幸福婚姻、追求事业高升，不停向前“追分”，在这一路跌撞、相互陪伴的欢笑与泪水中，定义属于自己的“成功”！This drama series follows a group of single tenants under the same roof who travelled north to pursue their dreams, love and friendship. programme.title: 综艺新时代 / New Style
programme.desc: 【综艺新时代】，发现台湾好所在。三位主持秉持“主持职人“的精神，以诙谐搞笑的方式，到台湾368个乡镇走透透，把台湾各地专业职人为台湾这片土地所做的努力介绍给观众。Spanning all 368 townships of Taiwan, this lively trio shines a light on local craftsmen—masters of their trade whose passion, grit, and love for the land reveal the island’s truest charm.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 4-5
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: TEBARAN HATI EPS 56
programme.desc: This story begins with Ariana, a renowned reporter and the adopted daughter of the respected Prawira family. She is willing to sacrifice everything to protect the good name of the family that raised her. When Ladya, her adopted younger sister, becomes depressed after getting pregnant out of wedlock and being abandoned by her boyfriend who flees abroad, to the point of attempting suicide, Ariana is asked by her adoptive mother, Indar, to claim the baby as her own. This decision shatters Ariana...

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 433
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 65
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and serves love through every dish. With the support of Hasbi—her boyfriend who later becomes her husban...

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 90
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a heavy heart.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 34
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even though, before they got married, it was Arya who promised Meira that he would cover all of her livin...

programme.title: 99 NAMA CINTA 16
programme.desc: Talia lives under the spotlight of cameras and the heat of celebrity news. Since her fiancé passed away, she has kept her heart tightly closed. To her, love only brings loss.Meanwhile, Kiblat is a respected young ustad—calm, courteous, and firm in his principles. His life is well-directed—until an incident brings him face-to-face with Talia in a heated argument over a minor accident. They instantly dislike each other. Unbeknownst to them, their parents have long been bound by a promise: to ar...

programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a heavy heart.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 35
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even though, before they got married, it was Arya who promised Meira that he would cover all of her livin...

programme.title: 99 NAMA CINTA 17
programme.desc: Talia lives under the spotlight of cameras and the heat of celebrity news. Since her fiancé passed away, she has kept her heart tightly closed. To her, love only brings loss.Meanwhile, Kiblat is a respected young ustad—calm, courteous, and firm in his principles. His life is well-directed—until an incident brings him face-to-face with Talia in a heated argument over a minor accident. They instantly dislike each other. Unbeknownst to them, their parents have long been bound by a promise: to ar...

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 7
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: TEBARAN HATI EPS 58
programme.desc: This story begins with Ariana, a renowned reporter and the adopted daughter of the respected Prawira family. She is willing to sacrifice everything to protect the good name of the family that raised her. When Ladya, her adopted younger sister, becomes depressed after getting pregnant out of wedlock and being abandoned by her boyfriend who flees abroad, to the point of attempting suicide, Ariana is asked by her adoptive mother, Indar, to claim the baby as her own. This decision shatters Ariana...

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 435-436
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Priya and Ranjan have paranormal experiences after she buys an antique box from a dealer. They learn that the box is a dybbuk and take the help of a rabbi to learn its history.

programme.title: Thondan
programme.desc: Narayanan, a politician's son, assaults Vishnu when his brother dies in his ambulance. Later, he makes Vishnu's life miserable by bribing the local police officers and government officials.

programme.title: Ghosty
programme.desc: Police officer, pursuing outlaw who escaped her father's custody 20 years ago, accidentally shoots someone else in a failed shootout.

programme.title: Jsk Janaki Vs State Of Kerala
programme.desc: Film tells the story of Janaki who becomes the victim of an inhuman activity, her unexpected encounter with Adv. David Abel Donovan and how she fights for her justice challenging the court and the judiciary system of India.

programme.title: Thiru Manickam
programme.desc: A man who is getting chased by everyone for doing good, yet he overcomes opposition. Among everyone who is trying to survive, this man wants to live. Shows how Manikkam becomes Thiru Manikkam

programme.title: The Great Father
programme.desc: The rape of his beloved 10-year-old daughter Sarah enrages David Nainan. As he & his wife try to locate the rapist, they discover his serial crimes.

programme.title: The Road
programme.desc: How a national highway becomes a primary conflict in the lives of Meera, a journalist, and Maya, a college professor, and makes their life upside down.

programme.title: Karuppan Kaatu Valasu
programme.desc: A rural village is heading towards a drastic transformation and a sudden death of 4 persons triggers a case.

programme.title: Sarkarin Elam

programme.title: Sivalinga
programme.desc: Raheem gets killed when he tries to save a blind man in a train. When the police close the case stating suicide, Raheem's girlfriend asks Shivalingeshwaran, a CID officer, to investigate the death.

programme.title: Balle Vellayatheva
programme.desc: Sakthi moves to a new village with his mother, a postmaster. He befriends a childless couple and falls in love with Thanikodi, the daughter of a butcher, despite their differences.

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: A young man struggles to find his place after moving in with his sister and her in-laws.

programme.title: Wild Dog
programme.desc: A series of deadly attacks occur that pose a threat to national security. In response, a brash but brilliant intelligence agent leads a covert operation to find the perpetrators.

programme.desc: Nana, a powerful gangster, vies for control of a village. However, Kathar, an honest man, strives for peace, resulting in a clash between the two.

programme.title: The Smile Man
programme.desc: A former cop diagnosed with Alzheimer s is drawn back into service to capture a killer known as the Smile Man, who carves smiles onto his victims' faces. As his memory deteriorates, he holds the key to solving the case.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA
programme.desc: This episode features main event Andrew 'One Gear' Van Zyl vs. Champion Dalcha for the heavyweight title. From EFC71 in Carnival City, Johannesburg, South Africa on 23-June-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features light heavyweights Andre 'S.O.G.' Ward (25-0, 13 KOs) vs. Chad Dawson (31-1, 17 KOs) in a championship contest from the Oracle Arena in Oakland, California, USA, on September 8, 2012. A paid attendance of 7,611 brought in a gate of $706,469 and 1.3 million viewed the fight on TV and saw the 2011 Fighter of...

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS!
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life. It's an unflinching portrait of a fighter who ...

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

He'll look to bring the title with him back to Porto, Portugal, when Uisma Lima faces Sh...

programme.title: WCK
programme.desc: K-1 returns with K-1 DONTAKU, headlined by a K-1 Heavyweight World Championship matchup between Roel Mannaart of The Netherlands and K-Jee of Japan. Roel Mannaart is the current champion and holds a 26-3 record, ranked within the top ten heavyweights in the world according to several publications. His opponent K-Jee is a K-1 veteran, debuting with the promotion ten years ago, having held Cruiserweight World Championship. Watch them collide with the K-1 Heavyweight World Championship on the li...

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1)
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4)
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different scooters - a purple scooter, a blue scooter and a bopping scooter.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3)
programme.desc: After accidentally causing a mini avalanche, Messy must help Lofty dig out the entrance to his cave.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1)
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3)
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: Bluey, Snickers, and Winton are on their way to ask Calypso for help with their problems, when they are ambushed by the Terriers and use their unique talents to get past.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1)
programme.desc: Andy, Jen & Scout head to Patagonia, in South America on a baby animal mission in search of mother puma and her four cubs.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1)
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23)
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1)
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1)
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1)
programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3)
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3)
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2)
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2)
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Supertato (S1)
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.title: Supertato (S1)
programme.desc: Evil Pea is tricked by lots of Supertatoes who appear all over the supermarket.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1)
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4)
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'pizza' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of pizza - a round pizza, a tomato pizza, a party pizza and a cheesy pizza!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3)
programme.desc: Mayor Oki wants to dress to impress the visiting mayor by wearing a gemstone-encrusted chain.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1)
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.desc: Mayor Oki wants to dress to impress the visiting mayor by wearing a gemstone-encrusted chain.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1)
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3)
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: It's bedtime and Bingo can't remember where she left her beloved Floppy. Retracing their steps, Bingo and Bluey lead their Mum through their bizarre day in the hope of tracking her down.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1)
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1)
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23)
programme.desc: Lorenzo decides to play a dangerous trick on his loyal coach Beppe.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: Duck wins a trip for two to a rather exciting hotel, and he finds that he settles in much quicker than Sarah.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1)
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1)
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1)
programme.desc: Invisibility, speed, electricity, and flight, the animals share all the exciting things they would do if they had magic powers.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1)
programme.desc: JoJo has drawn a picture to show Great Gran Gran over a video call, but just as she's about to show it, the internet goes down!

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2)
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3)
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2)
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy "Cauliflower Creak" song.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2)
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Supertato (S1)
programme.desc: Evil Pea is tricked by lots of Supertatoes who appear all over the supermarket.

programme.title: Supertato (S1)
programme.desc: The Cobs have finally had enough of Evil Pea's ungratefulness and team up with Supertato.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5)
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1)
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey (S3)
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1)
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: Teletubbies Ready Steady Go! (S1)
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing on safari.

programme.title: Pop Paper City (S1)
programme.desc: The friends board the Zip Express, a train that takes them across Pop Paper City. But when the friends face an unexpected challenge, it's unknown if the train will reach their destination on time.

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1)
programme.desc: Dog loves books, and Dog especially loves books with fairytales in them. But this particular book of fairytales has an unlucky imp inside it.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1)
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: While on a camping holiday, Bluey makes a new friend named called Jean-Luc. Bluey may not understand him, but they find a common language playing and hunting for a wild Daddy pig.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1)
programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1)
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1)
programme.desc: JoJo doesn't know what to do with her odd socks, so Gran Gran suggests they put on a puppet show! The two of them turn the socks into puppets, ready for a show in the garden.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2)
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23)
programme.desc: Gordon becomes very worried when he gets a serious case of the giggles. He must find a way to control his laughter before it does any damage.

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Bluey (S1)
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Supertato (S1)
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4)
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4)
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4)
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Mason is cooking a recipe named after the place it comes from: Yorkshire. Mason serves his recipe with broccoli, and lots of gravy.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1)
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7)
programme.desc: A mysterious Pirate Inspector is coming to visit Captain Captain and the pirates. If they fail the inspection, they will get a huge fine. But they soon suspect the Inspector is someone they know!

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1)
programme.desc: Lily finds a flight-themed book that has instructions on how to make simple aircrafts.

programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4)
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4)
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2)
programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Mason is cooking a recipe named after the place it comes from: Yorkshire. Mason serves his recipe with broccoli, and lots of gravy.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1)
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the jungles of Australia in search of a cassowary. Along the way, they meet some wild budgerigars.

programme.title: Swashbuckle (S7)
programme.desc: A mysterious Pirate Inspector is coming to visit Captain Captain and the pirates. If they fail the inspection, they will get a huge fine. But they soon suspect the Inspector is someone they know!

programme.title: Panda and Krash (S1)
programme.desc: Lily finds a flight-themed book that has instructions on how to make simple aircrafts.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Bluey (S2)
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Supertato (S2)
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: 送院途中 / Vital Signs
programme.desc: 救护员王维调至新分局后，被安排与救护队目马志业同组执勤。起初，王维因马sir的行事风格与自己差异甚大而感到不满。然而，在共同经历多次任务后，马sir的处事方式让王维重新领悟到——救护工作的核心，始终在于尽力拯救每一位伤者。

programme.title: 捉妖记2 / Monster Hunt 2
programme.desc: 胡巴踏上江湖寻亲之路，却遭妖王追击。危急之际，赌徒屠四谷出手相救，却在得知胡巴被悬赏后生出贪念，暗中盘算将他卖出换取重赏。与此同时，胡巴的父母心急如焚，与屠四谷达成交易，盼能赎回儿子。然而，重逢的喜悦尚未散去，更深的阴谋已悄然逼近……

programme.title: 恶战 / Once Upon a Time in Shanghai
programme.desc: 二十世纪初，各地劳动人口纷纷涌入高速发展之上海。山东青年马永贞(伍允龙 饰)亦到上海当码头工人。当时上海各帮派荼毒社会，其中较有正义感之龙七(安志杰 饰) 赏识马永贞胆识过人、武技非凡。二人惺惺相惜，成为好友。龙七反对贩毒及向日军卖力，与斧头帮三大犯罪头子白癞痢(陈观泰 饰)、笑面佛(袁祥仁 饰)、仇老四(冯克安 饰)为敌，马永贞与他连手反毒，令三人怀恨于心。马永贞与江湖卖艺的铁师父(洪金宝 饰)及其两个女儿铁梅(蒋璐霞 饰)、铁菊(胡然 饰)成为邻居。马永贞被铁菊的硬朗性格所吸引，而铁菊亦佩服马永贞的正义感，对他渐渐产生好感。龙七则迷恋上歌女盛香君(毛俊杰 饰)，没想到日后竟因此而身陷险境。斧头帮因不满龙七的嚣张跋扈，与日本间谍桥本密谋除掉他，龙七惨遭暗算。马永贞的邻居亦遭受袭击，马永贞赶至时已尸横遍野，垂死的铁师傅告知铁菊被斧头帮掳走。极度悲痛的马永贞为救铁菊，单人匹马闯入斧头帮老巢，决定用双手消灭国家的敌人、社会的败类，为民除害!

programme.title: 失衡凶间 / Tales from the Occult
programme.desc: 电影由三个发生于城市森林暗黑角落的诡异短篇故事组成。年轻歌手搬到新居后，感到有灵异生物在角落，导致抑郁症复发；一位网红来到商场表演，最后却变成一场死亡直播；唐楼租客连手对抗楼梯出现的神秘怪客。

programme.title: 我爱你! / Love Never Ends
programme.desc: 空巢老人和拾荒的孤寡老太不打不相识，却渐渐互生情愫；另一对年迈的夫妻俩靠收卖废品为生，妻子却深受疾病的困扰。两对老年爱人深爱着对方，哪怕不再有明天，也要对彼此说出「我爱你！」。

programme.title: 梅兰芳 / Forever Enthralled
programme.desc: 电影改编自中国戏曲艺术大师梅兰芳的真人真事，讲述梅兰芳从少时到成名后的遭遇，当中他经历了无数困难和挑战，而其标志性的美国之旅更将传统京剧带到西方。直至日本侵华期间，他才断然结束自己多年的职业生涯。

programme.title: 哪咤之魔童降世 / Ne Zha
programme.desc: 哪咤命中注定以灵珠之力拯救国家，为众生斩妖除魔。然而，龙王利用魔丸调换灵珠，导致哪咤一出生便化身惊世魔王，命运自此颠覆。最终，他唯有在善与恶之间挣扎，才能摆脱命运的束缚。

programme.title: 兰心大剧院 / Saturday Fiction
programme.desc: 1941年，著名演员于堇返回上海排演旧情人执导的话剧。她的出现却使各方纷纷设局，刺探她回归的真正目的。当于堇执行其间谍任务的时候，她开始怀疑自己应否揭发有关偷袭珍珠港的紧急情报。

programme.title: 第二十条 / Article 20
programme.desc: 检察官韩明在工作和家庭中面临重重挑战：他的儿子与同学发生冲突，妻子随之介入，而他在工作上又要处理与合作伙伴的紧张关系。除此以外，一宗重要的案件正考验着他对正义的坚持。为了追求公平与正义，韩明决定孤注一掷，冒险一切。
1921重现了中国共产党第一次召开全国代表大会的波澜壮阔历史时刻。影片以独有的青春格调结合谍战元素、国际视角等多个精彩看点，打造出庆祝建党一百周年的第一大片。

programme.title: 叶问：终极一战 / Ip Man- The Final Fight
programme.desc: 电影把这位一代宗师叶问晚年在香港的生活如实呈现–包括叶问不顾徒弟的反对，在妻子死后与红颜知己歌女的一段缘，与长子叶准之间亦师亦父的父子情，及与晋身成国际武打巨星的徒弟李小龙的重遇等。

programme.title: 唐探1900 / Detective Chinatown 1900
programme.desc: 1900年代，美国旧金山唐人街发生白人女子命案，疑凶为一名中国男子。此案引发社会公愤，并有人呼吁封闭唐人街。唐人街神探孖宝秦与福阿鬼在危机四伏的环境中争分夺秒，誓揭真凶，还原真相。

programme.title: 七月返归 / Back Home
programme.desc: 自幼有阴阳眼的向荣，某日收到母亲自杀不遂的消息。已移居外地的他返回香港旧居，却又看到比从前更恐怖的怪事。徘徊在人鬼当中，向荣决意要看清真相，走出恐惧的阴霾。

programme.title: 七月返归 / Back Home
programme.desc: 自幼有阴阳眼的向荣，某日收到母亲自杀不遂的消息。已移居外地的他返回香港旧居，却又看到比从前更恐怖的怪事。徘徊在人鬼当中，向荣决意要看清真相，走出恐惧的阴霾。

programme.title: 暗色天堂 / Heaven in the Dark
programme.desc: Michelle与杜牧师激情一吻后，到警署落案告杜牧师性骚扰，双方对簿公堂。杜牧师最终选择远离宗教，遁入俗世，反之Michelle则更对宗教沉迷。五年后二人重遇，才发现大家仍未将事情放下…

programme.title: 第一炉香 / Love After Love
programme.desc: 电影由许鞍华导演，改编自张爱玲的首部短篇小说。三十年代，年青女学生葛薇龙离乡别背井从上海到香港求学，因生活拮据，求助姑妈代交学费，却被姑妈利用，成为上流社会社交游戏的诱饵。当她爱上花花公子乔琪乔时，正是她堕落的开始。

programme.title: 尸杀列车 / Train to Busan
programme.desc: 丧尸一瞬间蜂涌突袭，韩国全面进入紧急状态﹗ 一位父亲带着女儿踏上骇人的丧尸列车，盼能抵达全国仅存的安全城市釜山。二人最后能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 小晓 / Trouble Girl
programme.desc: 小晓是一个患有过度活跃症的女孩，在学校经常遭到同学的霸凌。她的父亲在国外辛勤工作，而母亲则认为她总是制造麻烦。唯有班导保罗似乎能理解她的困扰，并舒缓她的情绪。某个台风夜晚，小晓目睹了妈妈与保罗之间的秘密。此时，她不仅要面对自己复杂的情感，还感受到人生的无助与孤独。

programme.title: 一出好戏 / The Island
programme.desc: 一场突如其来的陨石撞击地球，使一群正值团队建设之旅的员工遇上意外，流落荒岛。其中一个小职员马进坚决要逃出险境，因为他刚中了六千万元的彩票，需在九十天内兑奖。他最终能成功领奖吗？

programme.title: P风暴 / P Storm
programme.desc: 廖雨萍向廉政公署举报一个富二代在监狱中行贿惩教人员，以包庇他和其团伙在狱中的恶行。廉政公署首席调查主任陆志廉以囚犯的卧底身份入狱调查。尽管监狱危机四伏，陆志廉决定在狱友王蓝禄的帮助下，完成他的任务。

programme.title: 搜救 / Come Back Home
programme.desc: 寒冬季节，阿德一家自驾游到长白山旅行，途中却因走失其八岁儿子而乐极生悲。阿德向当地派出所求助，可惜孩子仍未找到。即使黄金救援时间已过去，阿德和救援队伍仍坚持继续搜救任务。最后又能否顺利拯救儿子？

programme.title: 命中注定那头鹅 / Penguin Girl
programme.desc: 月鹅钟爱阿德利企鹅，也深信真爱该如企鹅伴侣那般纯粹。当身穿企鹅装的何德利出现在她眼前时，她不禁思索，这是否就是命运安排的另一半。随着两人对未来的憧憬渐生迷惘，他们是否仍能如企鹅般成为忠诚的眷属？

programme.title: 热烈 / One and Only
programme.desc: 街舞老手丁雷力邀热衷街舞的陈烁加入自己经营的街舞团。舞团内高手如云，训练期间与陈烁碰撞出不同的火花。陈烁热烈追梦，并期待着上场的机会，却发现丁雷邀请他其实另有目的。丁雷和陈烁各自面对人生接二连三的沉重打击。他们能否逆风翻盘，回击人生难题？

programme.title: 九龙城寨之围城 / Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: 青年陈洛军因逃难误闯城寨，赫然发现城寨内乱中有序又很包容，从中认定了人生目标，领悟到不少做人的道理。他在城寨内结识了一众好兄弟：信一、十二少、四仔等。兄弟们以龙卷风为首，奋力抵抗恶势力大老板的入侵，并展开连番恶斗，誓死保卫城寨这个安身之地。

programme.title: 猎狐行动 / Fox Hunt
programme.desc: 本片改编自真实案件。诈骗犯戴逸宸骗取大量民众血汗钱后神秘失踪，七年潜逃海外后，终在法国巴黎现身。中国侦缉探员叶钧率领猎狐小队跨国追赃，却在行动中揭开惊人秘密。

programme.title: 全员嫌疑人 / All Suspects
programme.desc: 一名警察趁休假入住民宿，同宿的还有侦探小说家、流浪汉和钢琴师。然而，当民宿主人和接待员相继遇害，这片原本宁静的地方顿时笼罩在重重疑云之中。如今，每位住客既是嫌疑人，也是侦探——他们各自隐藏的秘密，都足以揭开整个谜团的真相。

programme.title: mono
programme.desc: Haruno's dry-cured ham is used in a recipe, and the group sets out to buy Yatsugatake ham. Along the way, they explore abandoned place and ski areas, enjoy Kiyosato curry and visit stores.

programme.title: mono
programme.desc: For Haruno's new manga idea, the girls participate in a spherical stone-hunting event. They go around Yamanashi looking for the roundest stone with the help of a smartphone application, but…

programme.title: D_CIDE TRAUMEREI THE ANIMATION
programme.desc: Ryuhei and team learn from Rando and Eru that the incidents in Shibuya are linked to Yurashima. Eru shares the "The Return of the Dead" legend and Ryuhei is surprised by the mention of "Kazuha Mound"…

programme.title: D_CIDE TRAUMEREI THE ANIMATION
programme.desc: Ryuhei learns that his brother's dying message is related to evil beings that used to dominate Earth. The day for career guidance comes. A mysterious phenomenon occurs before Ryuhei, Rena and Eri…

programme.title: NISEKOI
programme.desc: Shu is in charge of the Culture Festival, and he wants to put on the play “Romeo and Juliet.” He suggests Raku and Chitoge play the parts! Chitoge, still hurt by what happened at the beach, says she won't be in the play. Who will be Raku's Juliet now?

programme.title: NISEKOI
programme.desc: Surprisingly, Raku and Chitoge give a great performance as Romeo and Juliet. After the play, it looks like things are back to normal between Raku and Chitoge. Does this mean that Raku will finally choose the girl he wants to be with?

programme.title: The Dangers in My Heart
programme.desc: Ichikawa ends up in Yamada's workplace tour group by luck. After school, Ichikawa finds Yamada and Hara having fun talking to each other while he grows curious about their conversation.

programme.title: The Dangers in My Heart
programme.desc: Ichikawa and Yamada got separated from the group on the way back from the workplace tour. Eating is no longer allowed in the library. Will Ichikawa and Yamada's alone time end here?!

programme.title: My New Boss is Goofy
programme.desc: Momose panics upon receiving a call from Kurono, his former boss. With Shirosaki's encouragement, Momose makes the resolve to call Kurono. Then, Shirosaki brings up a certain suggestion...?!

programme.title: My New Boss is Goofy
programme.desc: Now freeloading at Shirosaki's place, Momose decides to tell Shirosaki everything about his former boss. While making a stop at his apartment, Momose finds a silhouette outside his window.

programme.title: The Many Sides of Voice Actor Radio
programme.desc: Yumiko and Kagasaki visit Yuhi's agency to apologize. Yumiko claims that she does not regret her actions, provoking President Kashima. Later, they run into Yuhi's senior, Mekuru Yubisaki.

programme.title: The Many Sides of Voice Actor Radio
programme.desc: To promote Heart Tart, Chika and Yumiko appear on Mekuru's radio show, where Yumiko is impressed by Mekuru's skills, despite her harsh remarks. However, something about Mekuru seems off…

programme.title: Sword Oratoria: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon? On the Side
programme.desc: A mysterious figure sends Ais to investigate the 24th floor where she teams up with the Hermes Familia. Meanwhile, Dionysus sends Filvis with Lefiya and Bete into the dungeon.

programme.title: Sword Oratoria: Is It Wrong to Try to Pick Up Girls in a Dungeon? On the Side
programme.desc: Bete confronts Filvis about her bloody past while Lefiya tries harder to integrate her into their team. Meanwhile, the Hermes Familia tries to reclaim Ais from the Tamer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Silent Witch
programme.desc: Monica secretly assists a terradragon fight in Craeme. Later, Monica joins the new teacher, McLagan's magecraftology class, where she reunites with Glen, the mage who fought the terradragon.

programme.title: Secrets of the Silent Witch
programme.desc: Monica is troubled as she has to be reassessed on ballroom dancing and attend a tea party. In her tea party group are Lana, Casey, and Claudia, a genius known as the walking library.

programme.title: Our Last Crusade or the Rise of a New World
programme.desc: Tensions are rising between the Empire and the Nebulis Sovereignty with the emergence of a Vortex. Alice suspects that Marquess Mask is trying monopolize all the astral energy.

programme.title: Our Last Crusade or the Rise of a New World
programme.desc: When Alice cannot get Iska off her mind, Rin suggests they meet to settle things once and for all. Meanwhile, Iska's party receives a high-level order to infiltrate the Nebulis Sovereignty.

programme.title: Sacrificial Princess and the King of Beasts
programme.desc: Jormungand summons Sariphi to attend the Imperial Council. At the council, Anubis proposes conditions for acknowledging Sariphi as queen.

programme.title: Sacrificial Princess and the King of Beasts
programme.desc: Sariphi succeeds in her first step to becoming queen. A young human assassin intrudes the palace. Sariphi rushes to the prison where the assassin is being restrained and gets a shock.

programme.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
programme.desc: Anos and company are sent to Azeshion of the human realm for a student exchange programme at the Hero Academy. Third-year student Eleanor Bianca offers to guide Anos around the campus.

programme.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
programme.desc: The day of the interschool exchange has come. But the students of the Hero Academy are not in the mood to welcome their visitors. Amidst the uneasiness, Anos steps up and shocks everyone.

programme.title: The Misfit of Demon King Academy
programme.desc: The second battle of the interschool examination has begun. Taking the baton from Rivest who was defeated, Anos' team is ready to face the Hero Academy's students.
