programme.title: DOC (SEASON 2)
programme.desc: Shunned on his return, Richard seeks redemption treating a delivery worker. Amy, TJ, Sonya and Jake juggle a tense legal case.

programme.title: ELSBETH (SEASON 3)
programme.desc: A fallen ‘90s supermodel (Jaime Pressly) returns to New York for a reunion and revenge, leading Elsbeth to sort through old grudges and lies to catch a killer. Meanwhile, Officer Hackett takes her turn in the spotlight.

programme.title: FBI (SEASON 7)
programme.desc: The team is thrown into an investigation that leads back to the resurgence of the online conspiracy.

programme.title: THE ROOKIE (SEASON 7)
programme.desc: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (SEASON 6)
programme.desc: SWAT teams up with the DEA to conduct a massive gang sweep, only to discover that a vicious cartel is planting roots in the city and endangering numerous lives; Hicks marks an important anniversary.

programme.title: CORONER (SEASON 4)
programme.desc: A death in a tight-knit community reveals the holes in a flawed refugee system. Gordon and Peggy's plans for a romantic weekend go awry, when Jenny falls ill and must oversee a remote autopsy.

programme.title: HUDSON & REX (SEASON 6)
programme.desc: When a prominent Judge disappears, Charlie and Rex piece together the crime with the help of a blind true crime podcaster who insists she heard a murder but could not see the culprit.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites (S1)
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain creates dishes for the perfect family day out, visits a rapeseed farm in Northampton and meets Gillian, Cornish Pasty Amateur World Champion.

programme.title: Donal Skehan: Home Cook (S1)
programme.desc: Donal shows us how to create his festive show-stoppers, including a spiced pear sticky toffee cake with maple and rum drizzle and sweet spiced loaves.

programme.title: DIY SOS (S34)
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Rafi was left with brain damage after suddenly falling seriously ill. After spending a year in hospital, he finally came home - but the house is not equipped to meet his complex needs.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S1)
programme.desc: Jason celebrates quick bites and food on-the-go Dubai-style, showcasing oysters with a spicy Asian-inspired dressing and a super easy and delicious grilled corn dish.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie rounds up his glorious summer offerings with his home-harvested honey and home-grown courgettes, and puts the cherry on the summer cake with a fabulously epic frangipane

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby (S6)
programme.desc: Rob and Monica work in one of Europe's last remaining family-owned 'grande dame' hotels - boasting a deep history and celebrity clientele list right in the heart of the Eternal City.

programme.title: Eva Pau's Asian Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: The making of gyozas, wontons or bao buns are just as meaningful as eating them and Eva shares her favourite Asian Street Food classics to create with your loved ones.

programme.title: Nadiya's Family Favourites (S1)
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain creates dishes for the perfect family day out, visits a rapeseed farm in Northampton and meets Gillian, Cornish Pasty Amateur World Champion.

programme.title: Jamie: Fast and Simple (S1)
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a trusty midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33)
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Keira Knightley, Malala Yousafzai, Aimee Lou Wood, Chris McCausland and Hozier.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars (S2)
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tasks the teams with host a drag brunch in Manchester. Who will keep a cool head as the guests demand an endless supply of food and drink?
